_note: FIXTURE DATA — hand-authored realistic snapshot, NOT live. Shape mirrors the Polymarket Gamma API (https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/markets). Prices are index-aligned with outcomes. Regenerate live copies with delphi/scripts/fetch_polymarket.py.

markets.question: What will the Fed decide at the September 2026 FOMC meeting?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves to the FOMC target-rate decision announced on September 17, 2026 per the official Federal Reserve statement. Exactly one outcome resolves YES.

markets.question: Will Bitcoin close above $100,000 on December 31, 2026?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the Coinbase BTC-USD spot price at 23:59:59 UTC on December 31, 2026 is greater than or equal to $100,000.

markets.question: Will it rain in New York City on July 15, 2026?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if NOAA records measurable precipitation (>= 0.01 in) at Central Park on July 15, 2026.

markets.question: Which party will win the 2028 US Presidential election?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves to the party of the winner of the 2028 US Presidential election as certified by Congress.

markets.question: Which party will control the US House after the 2026 midterms?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves to the party holding a majority of seats in the US House when the 120th Congress is seated.

markets.question: Will the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LXI?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LXI.

markets.question: Will OpenAI release GPT-6 before 2027?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if OpenAI publicly releases a model officially named 'GPT-6' before January 1, 2027, unless the release is a limited research preview. Resolution uses OpenAI's official blog as the source.

markets.question: Will a spot Solana ETF be approved in 2026?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the SEC approves at least one spot Solana ETF for listing before January 1, 2027.
